patches.name: Add resources
patches.description: Add resources such as strings or arrays to the app.

patches.name: Block Permissions Request
patches.description: Blocks the request of notification permissions on load of app.

patches.name: Change package name
patches.description: Appends ".morphe" to the package name by default. Changing the package name of the app can lead to unexpected issues.

options.title: Package name
options.description: The name of the package to rename the app to.

options.title: Update permissions
options.description: Update compatibility receiver permissions. Enabling this can fix installation errors, but this can also break features in certain apps.

options.title: Update providers
options.description: Update provider names declared by the app. Enabling this can fix installation errors, but this can also break features in certain apps.

patches.name: Disable Login Integrity
patches.description: Removes Play Integrity device attestation from login request.

patches.name: Disable Pairip license check
patches.description: Disables Play Integrity API (pairip) client-side license check. This patch does not bypass Play Integrity attestation or pairipcore virtualization.

patches.name: Disable ads
patches.description: Disables ads during audio streaming.

patches.name: Disable ads
patches.description: Disables all ads contained within the UI.

patches.name: Disable anti-tamper
patches.description: Disables anti-tamper checks including signature verification and purchase ID.

patches.name: Disable anti-tamper
patches.description: Disables various anti-tamper checks that causes the app to force-close.

patches.name: Disable signature check
patches.description: Removes the anti-tamper protection, which verifies apk signature, causing the app to force close.

patches.name: Disable telemetry
patches.description: Disables event logging sent to the app's custom endpoint.

patches.name: Enable FobMob+
patches.description: Enables app features locked behind the subscription paywall.

patches.name: Enable Plus
patches.description: Enable Plus membership (not all features are available). There is a strict version requirement for this patch.

patches.name: Enable Premium
patches.description: Enables app features locked behind the subscription paywall.

patches.name: Enable debug mode
patches.description: Enables hidden debug menu in settings.

patches.name: Force Native Keyboard
patches.description: When typing in normal lessons, Eggbun forces you to use their own on-screen keyboard. This patches forces the use of the default OS keyboard.

patches.name: GmsCore support
patches.description: Allows the app to work without root by using a different package name when patched using a GmsCore instead of Google Play Services.

patches.name: GmsCore support
patches.description: Allows the app to work without root by using a different package name when patched using a GmsCore instead of Google Play Services.

patches.name: Remove delay
patches.description: Removes the imposed delay when changing VPN servers.

patches.name: Remove trial limit
patches.description: Removes the imposed 6-hour trial usage limit.

patches.name: Rename shared permissions
patches.description: Rename certain permissions shared across Amazon apps. Applying this patch can fix installation errors, but can also break features in certain apps.

patches.name: Skip ads
patches.description: Automatically skips ads baked into the video stream.

patches.name: Spoof package signature
patches.description: Spoofs the SHA1 signature hash required for Firebase API calls.

patches.name: Unlimited skips
patches.description: Disables the limit for skipping songs during playback.

patches.name: Unlock custom DNS
patches.description: Enables the custom DNS feature usually locked behind the Proton Plus paywall.

patches.name: Unlock premium features
patches.description: Enables app features locked behind the subscription paywall. Some UI elements may not show an active membership, but this does not effect functionality.

patches.name: Unlock split tunneling
patches.description: Enables the split tunneling feature usually locked behind the Proton Plus paywall.
